overview: CyberPortal is a professional-grade cyber incident reporting platform for security operations teams. It provides a full incident lifecycle — from reporting to resolution — with real-time dashboards, threat intelligence, alerts management, and QR-based incident sharing. Designed for SOC analysts with a dark glassmorphic cyber theme and full mobile responsiveness.
features: 3-tab incident report form with voice input (6 languages), file upload, and QR generation
Live dashboard with metrics cards, pie/bar/severity charts, and critical alerts table
All Incidents page with search, filter, sort, CSV export, pagination, and detail modal
Track & Timeline page with vertical incident lifecycle visualization
Threat Intelligence page with IOC indicators and severity heatmap
Alerts management with severity filtering, acknowledge, false positive, and create-incident actions
Dark cyber glassmorphic theme with neon accents and mobile-responsive sidebar
Motoko backend with full CRUD for incidents and alerts plus sample data preload
